rationale.R1.5: The output proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, but not for every recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (no mention of API failure modes).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
